mapper.select: SELECT id, endpoint_url, encrypted_secret, enabled FROM webhook_configs WHERE enabled = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO webhook_configs(endpoint_url, encrypted_secret, enabled, deleted) VALUES(#{endpointUrl}, #{encryptedSecret}, #{enabled}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT id, endpoint_url, encrypted_secret, enabled FROM webhook_configs WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM webhook_configs WHERE deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, endpoint_url, encrypted_secret, enabled FROM webhook_configs WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE webhook_configs SET endpoint_url = #{endpointUrl}, encrypted_secret = #{encryptedSecret}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE webhook_configs SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
